basic_details.job_title: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.application_mode: Offline (Hard copy by Post) or Email
basic_details.short_information: Bharathiar University is recruiting 1 Project Assistant for a CMRG-funded research project in the Department of Mathematics. Candidates with First Class M.Sc. in Mathematics can apply. Last date: 24 July 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be notified later to shortlisted candidates

application_fee.details: There is No Application Fee for this recruitment.

age_limit.age_details: Government of Tamil Nadu under Chief Minister's Research Grant (CMRG)

qualification.details: Candidates must meet the following criteria as on the date of application.

vacancy_details.details: A single vacancy of Project Assistant is announced for this prestigious CMRG project focused on green energy, hydrogen fuel storage, and sustainable energy security in Tamil Nadu. The role involves research in Operational Research, Fuzzy Mathematics, and Decision Sciences applied to energy solutions.

selection_process: Selection will be done through screening of applications followed by Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be notified by email. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The selected candidate must join at the earliest.
how_to_apply: Interested candidates should submit the application as per the prescribed format:
Fill the Bio-data form (enclosed in notification) neatly.
Attach attested copies of mark sheets, degree certificates, proof of age, experience certificates (if any), and other relevant documents.
Send hard copy by post to the Principal Investigator or email a scanned copy.
Address for Hard Copy: Dr. S. Narayanamoorthy Associate Professor and Head, Principal Investigator, CMRG-Project Department of Mathematics, Bharathiar University Coimbatore - 641046, Tamil Nadu
important_instructions: This is a temporary project position for 3 years. No claim for permanent absorption. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Selected candidate will work full-time on the project under the guidance of the Principal Investigator. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. The University reserves the right to cancel the recruitment at any stage without assigning any reason.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Bharathiar University, Coimbatore has invited applications for one post of Project Assistant in the Department of Mathematics under the CMRG Project sanctioned by the Government of Tamil Nadu. The notification includes full details on eligibility, stipend, duration, and application procedure. Candidates are strongly advised to read the official notification and submit the prescribed bio-data format before the deadline. Download Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Bharathiar University is recruiting 1 Project Assistant for a CMRG-funded research project in the Department of Mathematics. Candidates with First Class M.Sc. in Mathematics can apply. Last date: 24 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A single vacancy of Project Assistant is announced for this prestigious CMRG project focused on green energy, hydrogen fuel storage, and sustainable energy security in Tamil Nadu. The role involves research in Operational Research, Fuzzy Mathematics, and Decision Sciences applied to energy solutions.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must meet the following criteria as on the date of application.

rows.details: Basic knowledge in Operational Research (OR), Fuzzy Mathematics, and Decision Sciences
As per University / Government of Tamil Nadu norms
Good communication skills and research aptitude. Ready to join immediately upon selection.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: There is No Application Fee for this recruitment.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be done through screening of applications followed by Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be notified by email. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The selected candidate must join at the earliest.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates should submit the application as per the prescribed format: Fill the Bio-data form (enclosed in notification) neatly. Attach attested copies of mark sheets, degree certificates, proof of age, experience certificates (if any), and other relevant documents. Send hard copy by post to the Principal Investigator or email a scanned copy. Submit on or before 24 July 2026. Address for Hard Copy: Dr. S. Narayanamoorthy Associate Professor and Head, Principal Investigator, CMRG-Project Department of Mathematics, Bharathiar University Coimbatore - 641046, Tamil Nadu

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Bharathiar University Project Assistant Candidates
content_sections.text: This is a temporary project position for 3 years. No claim for permanent absorption. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Selected candidate will work full-time on the project under the guidance of the Principal Investigator. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. The University reserves the right to cancel the recruitment at any stage without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 24 July 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q2. What is the stipend for Project Assistant at Bharathiar University CMRG Project?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated stipend of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for Bharathiar University Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have First Class in M.Sc. Mathematics with basic knowledge in Operational Research, Fuzzy Mathematics, and Decision Sciences.

faq.question: Q4. How to apply for Bharathiar University CMRG Project Assistant vacancy?
faq.answer: Submit the filled bio-data form along with attested documents via post to Dr. S. Narayanamoorthy or email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Bharathiar University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The duration of the project is 3 Years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the project title under CMRG at Bharathiar University?
faq.answer: "Towards Green Energy in Tamil Nadu: A Strategic Assessment of Hydrogen Fuel Storage Solutions for Sustainable Energy Security".

faq.question: Q8. Will interview be conducted for Bharathiar University Project Assistant selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be invited for an interview at a later date.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job at Bharathiar University?
faq.answer: No, it is a temporary contractual position for the duration of the 3-year project.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are needed for Bharathiar University Project Assistant application?
faq.answer: Resume in prescribed format, attested mark sheets, degree certificates, proof of age, experience certificates (if any), and other relevant documents.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 24 July 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered.

faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated stipend of Rs. 25,000/- per month.
